content_en:
"Destroying everything by the Command of its Lord!" (46:25) Its means destroys everything that is prone to destruction.

The Black Seed helps against all types of cold ailments. In addition, the Black Seed helps introduce the effective ingredients of cold medications to the areas affected by hot and dry ailments, as it helps the body absorb the medicine quickly when taken in small dosages.

The author of the 'Qanoon' and other people stated that saffron blended with camphor has similar effects, because saffron helps the camphor reach the affected area quickly. There are several types of plants that have similar effects as saffron. It is possible that the hot substance benefits in cases of hot diseases. For instance, the Anzarut, which is a type of eyeliner, is mixed with other remedies for Ophthalmia, conjunctivitis, and so forth. Ophthalmia is a hot tumor as the doctors agree. In addition, sulfur is a remedy for hot mange.

Shuneiz is hot and dry in the third degree, eliminates flatulence, extracts the helminthes (worms), relieves leprosy, and phlegmy fevers, opens clogs, decomposes accumulating gas and excess moisture in the stomach. When the Shuneiz is ground, blended with

——— The Prophetic Medicine

honey and drunk with some warm water, it will dissolve the stones that appear in the kidney and the prostate, and it is In addition diuretic. It increases the flow during menstruation and the production of milk if it is drunk for several days. When it is heated with vinegar and placed on the stomach, it will eliminate helminthes (worms). When it is blended with wet or cooked colorynth water, it is more effective in removing helminthes (worms). It In addition clears up, decomposes and relieves cold symptoms when it is ground in a rag and inhaled through the nose on a regular basis until the ailment is cured.

Black seed oil helps against snakebites, hemorrhoids and spots. When around twenty-five grams of it is drunk with water it will help against gasping and hard breathing.

When the black seeds are cooked in vinegar and then one rinses his mouth with it, it will relieve toothache resulting from sensitivity to cold. When one inhales powdered black seed, it will help against water that accumulates in the eye. When it is used in a bandage while blended with vinegar, it heals spots and exposed skin ulcers and decomposes the acute mucus tumors and In addition hard tumors.

The oil of the Black Seed In addition helps against facial paralysis when administered by the nose. When one

drinks around twenty-five grams of its oil, it helps against spider bite. When it is ground finely and blended with the oil of the green Seed and used as ear drops, only up to three drops, it helps against cold symptoms, flatulence and various clogs.

When the Black Seed is fried and finely ground, soaked in oil and then drops are administered in the nose, it will help against cold conditions accompanied by intensive sneezing,

When the Black Seed is burned and mixed with melted wax along with henna or iris oil, it helps remove the ulcers that appear on the skin of the legs, after washing the skin with vinegar.

When the Black Seeds are crushed in vinegar and laid on leprous skin, the skin affected by black pigmentation and on the head that is affected by dandruff, it helps relieve these ailments.

When the Black Seeds are ground finely and one swallows around twenty-five grams of it each day with cold water, it instantly helps against the bite of rabid dogs, and might prevent death as a result of hydrophobia. When one administers the oil of the Black seed in the nose, it will help against facial paralysis and tetanus by eliminating their causes. Finally, when the Black seeds are burned, they help repulse the venomous beasts.

—— The Prophetic Medicine

When Persian kohl is dissolved in water and then placed on the interior of the throat and then the Black seeds are sprinkled on it, it acts like an effective remover of hemorrhoids. There are many other benefits for the Shuneiz. We should state that the dose should be around twenty-five grams, as some people claim that using excessive dosages of it might cause death.

We mentioned that the Prophet : b allowed AzZubayr and Abdur-Rahman bin 'Awf to wear silk because of a rash that they suffered from. We mentioned the benefits of the silk in that chapter.

Every day [that the fever lasts], one should swallow the paper with some water.

An Amulet for sciatica

One should write, "In the Name of Allah. O Allah, Lord of everything, Owner of everything and Creator of everything! You have created me and the sciatic nerve. Do not give it power over me, nor allow me to cut it. Heal me completely and eradicate the illness. There is none who can heal except You."

An Amulet for bleeding veins

At-Termezey narrated that Ibn Ab'ass said that the Messenger of Allah b used to teach them to recite [the following Ruqyah], against fever and various pains, "In the Name of Allah, the Most Great. I seek refuge with Allah, the All-Mighty, from the evil of bleeding veins and from the evil of the fire's heat."

An Amulet for Toothache.

One should write on the cheek that is closer to the pain, “In the Name of Allah, Most Gracious, Most Merciful.

"It is He Who has created for you (the sense of) hearing (ears), eyes (sight), and hearts (understanding). Little thanks you give."

all (VY) "And to Him belongs whatsoever exists in the

night and the day, and He is the All-Hearing, the AllKnowing." (6:13)

An Amulet for abscess

~—— The Prophetic Medicine

One should write [this amulet and place it] on the abscess,

"And they ask you concerning the mountains: say, "My Lord will blast them and scatter them as particles of dust. Then He shall leave them as a level smooth plain."

Abu Hanifah Ad-Daynoory said, "Cress seeds are used in remedies and are In addition called Ath-Thuffaa, which the Prophet s&, mentioned. Its plant is called AIHurf while Rashad seeds is its popular name." In addition, Abu Ubayd said that Ath-Thuffaa is the Hurf.

The Hadith that Abu Hanifah referred to is what Abu Ubay and other scholars have related from Ibn Abbas that the Prophet b was reported to have said:

"What a cure do the two bitter remedies carry: the Thuffaa and aloe."

Cress is hot and dry in the third degree, and it heats and relaxes the stomach, removes different types of

worms, decomposes the spleen tumors, excites the sexual drive and heals the ulcers of mange and herpes.

When the cress is used as a bandage along with honey, it will decompose spleen tumors. When it is cooked with henna, it will extract harmful accumulations in the chest, while taking it as a drink helps against venomous bites and stings.

When it is burned, its smoke repulses venomous beasts and prevents the hair form falling. In addition, when it is mixed with barley flour and vinegar and used as a bandage it helps against decomposes hot tumors.

Further, when it is used as a bandage with water, it brings the pustules to maturity and helps against flabbiness in various organs, strengthens the sexual drive and works as an appetite stimulant. It In addition helps against asthma, hard breathing, relieves the thickness in the spleen, purifies the chest and increases the menstrual flow. It In addition helps against sciatic nerve and the cavity of the hip, due to the extraction power of the cress when one drinks it or is injected with it. It In addition purifies the chest and the lungs from phlegm.

When cress is crushed and taken in a drink with warm water, it will work as a laxative, decomposes flatulence and helps against the pain caused by constipation. Further, cress In addition helps against

——— The Prophetic Medicine

leprosy when it is crushed and used in a drink.

In addition, when the cress is blended with vinegar and used as an ointment on leprous skin and on white pigmentation disorder, it helps relieve these conditions. It a so relieves headaches that are caused by colds and by phlegm accumulation. When it is fried and drunk (with water), it constipates, especially when it is not crushed, as its consistency will be softened when it is fried.

Galinus said that the strength of the cress, "Is similar to the effectiveness of mustard grains. Hence it could be used to heat the pain in the hip, which is known as Noso and headaches, as each of these symptoms requires heat, similar to mustard seed. Sometimes, cress is mixed with other remedies and used to treat asthma, as it is known that it dissolves thick mixtures, again just as mustard seed does. It is similar to mustard seed in every respect."

The Prophet s was reported to have visited Sa'd bin Abi Waqgas b .mi once when he was-+H while in Makkah and he asked that a doctor be brought to examine him. They brought AI-Harith bin Kaladah who examined him and said, "There is no harm with him, just cook some fenugreek with dates and let him eat them." Sa'd was reported to have done that and was then healed.

Hulbah is hot in the second degree and dry in the first degree.

When the fenugreek is cooked in water, it will soften the throat, chest and the stomach. It In addition relieves coughing, dryness, asthma, hard breathing and increases the sexual drive. It In addition relieves flatulence, phlegm, piles and the various accumulations in the intestines. It In addition dissolves the phlegm from the chest and helps against gastric ulcer and lung diseases. ‘Hulbah is used to heal the intestines, mixed with some ghee and fanith.

When five measures of fenugreek is taken in a drink, it will increase the flow of menstruation, and when it is cooked and the hair is washed with it, it will make it curly and will combat dandruff.

When the flour of the fenugreek is blended with some vinegar and natron and used as a bandage on the tumor of the spleen, it will dissolve it. In addition, the woman who suffers from pain in the vagina due to a tumor will benefit if she sits in the water in which the fenugreek was cooked.

When it is used as a bandage and placed on hard, cold tumors, it will help dissolve these tumors. In addition, when its water is drunk, it will help against the pain in the sto:mach that results from accumulating

—— The Prophetic Medicine gaseous materials and will cleanse the intestines.
content_id:
"Menghancurkan segala sesuatu atas Perintah Tuhannya!" (46:25) Maknanya menghancurkan segala sesuatu yang rentan terhadap kehancuran.

Biji Hitam membantu mengatasi semua jenis penyakit dingin. Selain itu, Biji Hitam membantu mengantarkan bahan-bahan efektif dari obat-obatan dingin ke area yang terkena penyakit panas dan kering, karena membantu tubuh menyerap obat dengan cepat ketika dikonsumsi dalam dosis kecil.

Pengarang kitab 'Qanoon' dan orang-orang lainnya menyatakan bahwa safron yang dicampur dengan kamper memiliki efek serupa, karena safron membantu kamper mencapai area yang terkena dengan cepat. Ada beberapa jenis tanaman yang memiliki efek serupa dengan safron. Mungkin saja zat panas bermanfaat dalam kasus penyakit panas. Misalnya, Anzarut, yang merupakan sejenis celak mata, dicampur dengan obat-obatan lain untuk oftalmia, konjungtivitis, dan sebagainya. Oftalmia adalah tumor panas sebagaimana yang disepakati para dokter. Selain itu, belerang adalah obat untuk kudis panas.

Shuneiz bersifat panas dan kering pada tingkat ketiga, menghilangkan kembung, mengeluarkan cacing helminthes, meredakan kusta, dan demam berdahak, membuka sumbatan, menguraikan gas yang menumpuk dan kelembaban berlebih di perut. Ketika Shuneiz digiling, dicampur dengan

——— Pengobatan Nabawi

madu dan diminum dengan sedikit air hangat, maka akan melarutkan batu yang muncul di ginjal dan prostat, dan juga bersifat diuretik. Memperbanyak aliran saat menstruasi dan produksi ASI jika diminum selama beberapa hari. Ketika dipanaskan dengan cuka dan diletakkan di atas perut, akan menghilangkan cacing helminthes. Ketika dicampur dengan air koloquint basah atau matang, lebih efektif dalam mengeluarkan cacing helminthes. Juga membersihkan, menguraikan, dan meredakan gejala dingin ketika digiling dalam kain dan dihirup melalui hidung secara teratur hingga penyakit sembuh.

Minyak biji hitam membantu mengatasi gigitan ular, wasir, dan bintik-bintik. Ketika sekitar dua puluh lima gram diminum dengan air, akan membantu mengatasi sesak napas dan napas yang berat.

Ketika biji hitam dimasak dalam cuka kemudian seseorang berkumur dengannya, akan meredakan sakit gigi yang diakibatkan oleh sensitivitas terhadap dingin. Ketika seseorang menghirup serbuk biji hitam, akan membantu mengatasi air yang menumpuk di mata. Ketika digunakan sebagai perban yang dicampur dengan cuka, menyembuhkan bintik-bintik dan ulkus kulit terbuka serta menguraikan tumor lendir akut dan juga tumor keras.

Minyak Biji Hitam juga membantu mengatasi kelumpuhan wajah ketika diberikan melalui hidung. Ketika seseorang

meminum sekitar dua puluh lima gram minyaknya, membantu mengatasi gigitan laba-laba. Ketika digiling halus dan dicampur dengan minyak Biji hijau serta digunakan sebagai tetes telinga, tidak lebih dari tiga tetes, membantu mengatasi gejala dingin, kembung, dan berbagai sumbatan.

Ketika Biji Hitam digoreng dan digiling halus, direndam dalam minyak kemudian diteteskan ke dalam hidung, akan membantu mengatasi kondisi dingin yang disertai bersin-bersin yang intens.

Ketika Biji Hitam dibakar dan dicampur dengan lilin yang telah dilelehkan bersama minyak henna atau iris, membantu menghilangkan ulkus yang muncul pada kulit kaki, setelah membersihkan kulit dengan cuka.

Ketika Biji Hitam dihancurkan dalam cuka dan dioleskan pada kulit yang terkena kusta, kulit yang terkena pigmentasi hitam, dan kepala yang terkena ketombe, membantu meredakan penyakit-penyakit ini.

Ketika Biji Hitam digiling halus dan seseorang menelan sekitar dua puluh lima gram setiap hari dengan air dingin, secara seketika membantu mengatasi gigitan anjing gila, dan mungkin mencegah kematian akibat hidrofobia. Ketika seseorang meneteskan minyak Biji Hitam ke dalam hidung, akan membantu mengatasi kelumpuhan wajah dan tetanus dengan menghilangkan penyebabnya. Akhirnya, ketika Biji Hitam dibakar, membantu mengusir binatang berbisa.

—— Pengobatan Nabawi

Ketika kohl Persia dilarutkan dalam air kemudian dioleskan pada bagian dalam tenggorokan dan Biji Hitam ditaburkan di atasnya, maka berfungsi sebagai penghilang wasir yang efektif. Masih banyak manfaat lain dari Shuneiz. Perlu kami sampaikan bahwa dosisnya seharusnya sekitar dua puluh lima gram, karena sebagian orang berpendapat bahwa penggunaan dosis berlebihan dapat menyebabkan kematian.

Kami telah menyebutkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ mengizinkan Az-Zubayr dan Abdur-Rahman bin 'Awf untuk memakai sutra karena ruam yang mereka derita. Kami telah menyebutkan manfaat sutra dalam bab tersebut.

Setiap hari [selama demam berlangsung], seseorang harus menelan kertas tersebut dengan sedikit air.

Jimat untuk saraf siatik

Seseorang harus menulis, "Dengan nama Allah. Ya Allah, Tuhan segala sesuatu, Pemilik segala sesuatu dan Pencipta segala sesuatu! Engkau telah menciptakanku dan saraf siatik ini. Janganlah Engkau berikan kekuatan atasku, dan janganlah biarkan aku memotongnya. Sembuhkanlah aku sepenuhnya dan basmi penyakit ini. Tiada yang dapat menyembuhkan kecuali Engkau."

Jimat untuk pembuluh darah yang berdarah

At-Tirmidzi meriwayatkan bahwa Ibnu Abbas berkata bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mengajari mereka untuk membaca [ruqyah berikut], untuk mengatasi demam dan berbagai rasa sakit, "Dengan nama Allah Yang Maha Agung. Aku berlindung kepada Allah Yang Maha Perkasa dari keburukan pembuluh darah yang berdarah dan dari keburukan panas api."

Jimat untuk sakit gigi.

Seseorang harus menulis pada pipi yang lebih dekat dengan rasa sakit, "Dengan nama Allah, Yang Maha Pengasih, Maha Penyayang.

"Dialah yang telah menciptakan bagimu pendengaran (telinga), penglihatan (mata), dan hati (pemahaman). Sedikit sekali kamu bersyukur."

semua (VY) "Dan kepunyaan-Nyalah segala yang ada di

malam dan siang hari, dan Dia-lah Yang Maha Mendengar, Maha Mengetahui." (6:13)

Jimat untuk abses

~—— Pengobatan Nabawi

Seseorang harus menulis [jimat ini dan meletakkannya] di atas abses,

"Dan mereka bertanya kepadamu tentang gunung-gunung: katakanlah, 'Tuhanku akan menghancurkannya dan menyebarkannya sebagai partikel-partikel debu. Kemudian Dia akan meninggalkannya sebagai dataran yang rata dan licin.'"

Abu Hanifah Ad-Daynoory berkata, "Biji selada air digunakan dalam obat-obatan dan juga disebut Ath-Thuffaa, yang disebutkan oleh Nabi ﷺ. Tanamannya disebut Al-Hurf sementara biji Rashad adalah nama populernya." Selain itu, Abu Ubayd berkata bahwa Ath-Thuffaa adalah Hurf.

Hadith yang dirujuk oleh Abu Hanifah adalah apa yang telah diriwayatkan oleh Abu Ubay dan ulama lainnya dari Ibnu Abbas bahwa Nabi ﷺ dilaporkan telah bersabda:

"Betapa mujarabnya dua obat pahit ini: Thuffaa dan lidah buaya."

Selada air bersifat panas dan kering pada tingkat ketiga, memanaskan dan merilekskan perut, menghilangkan berbagai jenis cacing, menguraikan tumor limpa, membangkitkan hasrat seksual, dan menyembuhkan ulkus kudis dan herpes.

Ketika selada air digunakan sebagai perban bersama madu, akan menguraikan tumor limpa. Ketika dimasak dengan henna, akan mengeluarkan akumulasi berbahaya di dada, sementara meminumnya membantu mengatasi gigitan dan sengatan berbisa.

Ketika dibakar, asapnya mengusir binatang berbisa dan mencegah kerontokan rambut. Selain itu, ketika dicampur dengan tepung jelai dan cuka serta digunakan sebagai perban, membantu menguraikan tumor panas.

Lebih lanjut, ketika digunakan sebagai perban dengan air, mematangkan pustula dan membantu mengatasi kelembutan pada berbagai organ, memperkuat hasrat seksual, dan berfungsi sebagai stimulan nafsu makan. Juga membantu mengatasi asma, napas berat, meredakan penebalan pada limpa, membersihkan dada, dan memperbanyak aliran menstruasi. Juga membantu mengatasi saraf siatik dan rongga pinggul, berkat kekuatan ekstraksi selada air ketika diminum atau disuntikkan. Juga membersihkan dada dan paru-paru dari dahak.

Ketika selada air dihancurkan dan diminum dengan air hangat, akan bekerja sebagai pencahar, menguraikan kembung, dan membantu mengatasi rasa sakit akibat sembelit. Selain itu, selada air juga membantu mengatasi

——— Pengobatan Nabawi

kusta ketika dihancurkan dan diminum.

Selain itu, ketika selada air dicampur dengan cuka dan digunakan sebagai salep pada kulit yang terkena kusta dan gangguan pigmentasi putih, membantu meredakan kondisi-kondisi ini. Juga meredakan sakit kepala yang disebabkan oleh masuk angin dan penumpukan dahak. Ketika digoreng dan diminum (dengan air), menyebabkan konstipasi, terutama ketika tidak dihancurkan, karena konsistensinya akan melunak ketika digoreng.

Galinus berkata tentang kekuatan selada air, "Serupa dengan efektivitas biji mustard. Karenanya dapat digunakan untuk memanaskan rasa sakit di pinggul, yang dikenal sebagai Noso dan sakit kepala, karena masing-masing gejala ini membutuhkan panas, serupa dengan biji mustard. Kadang-kadang, selada air dicampur dengan obat-obatan lain dan digunakan untuk mengobati asma, karena diketahui bahwa ia melarutkan campuran yang kental, sekali lagi seperti biji mustard. Ia serupa dengan biji mustard dalam segala hal."

Nabi ﷺ dilaporkan pernah mengunjungi Sa'd bin Abi Waqqash رضي الله عنه suatu ketika ketika beliau sedang sakit saat berada di Makkah dan beliau meminta agar seorang dokter dibawa untuk memeriksanya. Mereka membawa Al-Harith bin Kaladah yang memeriksanya dan berkata, "Tidak ada yang berbahaya dengan dirinya, cukup masak sejumlah biji fenugreek dengan kurma dan biarkan ia memakannya." Sa'd dilaporkan telah melakukan hal itu dan kemudian sembuh.

Hulbah bersifat panas pada derajat kedua dan kering pada derajat pertama.

Ketika biji fenugreek dimasak dalam air, ia akan melembutkan tenggorokan, dada, dan perut. Selain itu, ia juga meredakan batuk, kekeringan, asma, sesak napas, dan meningkatkan gairah seksual. Ia juga meredakan kembung, dahak, wasir, dan berbagai penumpukan di usus. Ia pun melarutkan dahak dari dada dan membantu mengatasi tukak lambung serta penyakit paru-paru. Hulbah digunakan untuk menyembuhkan usus, dicampur dengan sedikit ghee dan fanith.

Ketika lima takaran fenugreek diminum, ia akan memperlancar aliran haid. Dan apabila dimasak lalu air rebusannya digunakan untuk mencuci rambut, ia akan membuat rambut menjadi keriting dan mengatasi ketombe.

Ketika tepung fenugreek dicampur dengan sedikit cuka dan natron lalu digunakan sebagai perban pada tumor limpa, ia akan melarutkannya. Selain itu, wanita yang menderita rasa sakit pada vagina akibat tumor akan merasakan manfaatnya jika ia berendam dalam air rebusan fenugreek.

Ketika digunakan sebagai perban dan ditempelkan pada tumor yang keras dan dingin, ia akan membantu melarutkan tumor-tumor tersebut. Selain itu, ketika air rebusannya diminum, ia akan membantu mengatasi nyeri perut yang diakibatkan oleh penumpukan

—— Thibbun Nabawi bahan-bahan gas dan akan membersihkan usus.

"And they ask you concerning the mountains: say, "My Lord will blast them and scatter them as particles of dust. Then He shall leave them as a level smooth plain."

Abu Hanifah Ad-Daynoory said, "Cress seeds are used in remedies and are In addition called Ath-Thuffaa, which النبي ﷺ s&, mentioned. Its plant is called AIHurf while Rashad seeds is its popular name." In addition, Abu Ubayd said that Ath-Thuffaa is the Hurf.

The الحديث that Abu Hanifah referred to is what Abu Ubay and other scholars have related from Ibn Abbas that النبي ﷺ b was reported to have said:

"What a cure do the two bitter remedies carry: the Thuffaa and aloe."

Cress is hot and dry in the third degree, and it heats and relaxes the stomach, removes different types of

worms, decomposes the spleen tumors, excites the sexual drive and heals the ulcers of mange and herpes.

When the cress is used as a bandage along with honey, it will decompose spleen tumors. When it is cooked with henna, it will extract harmful accumulations in the chest, while taking it as a drink helps against venomous bites and stings.

When it is burned, its smoke repulses venomous beasts and prevents the hair form falling. In addition, when it is mixed with barley flour and vinegar and used as a bandage it helps against decomposes hot tumors.

Further, when it is used as a bandage with water, it brings the pustules to maturity and helps against flabbiness in various organs, strengthens the sexual drive and works as an appetite stimulant. It In addition helps against asthma, hard breathing, relieves the thickness in the spleen, purifies the chest and increases the menstrual flow. It In addition helps against sciatic nerve and the cavity of the hip, due to the extraction power of the cress when one drinks it or is injected with it. It In addition purifies the chest and the lungs from phlegm.

When cress is crushed and taken in a drink with warm water, it will work as a laxative, decomposes flatulence and helps against the pain caused by constipation. Further, cress In addition helps against

——— The Prophetic Medicine

leprosy when it is crushed and used in a drink.

In addition, when the cress is blended with vinegar and used as an ointment on leprous skin and on white pigmentation disorder, it helps relieve these conditions. It a so relieves headaches that are caused by colds and by phlegm accumulation. When it is fried and drunk (with water), it constipates, especially when it is not crushed, as its consistency will be softened when it is fried.

Galinus said that the strength of the cress, "Is similar to the effectiveness of mustard grains. Hence it could be used to heat the pain in the hip, which is known as Noso and headaches, as each of these symptoms requires heat, similar to mustard seed. Sometimes, cress is mixed with other remedies and used to treat asthma, as it is known that it dissolves thick mixtures, again just as mustard seed does. It is similar to mustard seed in every respect."

النبي ﷺ s was reported to have visited Sa'd bin Abi Waqgas b .mi once when he was-+H while in Makkah and he asked that a doctor be brought to examine him. They brought AI-Harith bin Kaladah who examined him and said, "There is no harm with him, just cook some fenugreek with dates and let him eat them." Sa'd was reported to have done that and was then healed.

Hulbah is hot in the second degree and dry in the first degree.

When the fenugreek is cooked in water, it will soften the throat, chest and the stomach. It In addition relieves coughing, dryness, asthma, hard breathing and increases the sexual drive. It In addition relieves flatulence, phlegm, piles and the various accumulations in the intestines. It In addition dissolves the phlegm from the chest and helps against gastric ulcer and lung diseases. ‘Hulbah is used to heal the intestines, mixed with some ghee and fanith.

When five measures of fenugreek is taken in a drink, it will increase the flow of menstruation, and when it is cooked and the hair is washed with it, it will make it curly and will combat dandruff.

When the flour of the fenugreek is blended with some vinegar and natron and used as a bandage on the tumor of the spleen, it will dissolve it. In addition, the woman who suffers from pain in the vagina due to a tumor will benefit if she sits in the water in which the fenugreek was cooked.

When it is used as a bandage and placed on hard, cold tumors, it will help dissolve these tumors. In addition, when its water is drunk, it will help against the pain in the sto:mach that results from accumulating

—— The Prophetic Medicine gaseous materials and will cleanse the intestines.
